diff: The minimum discount applied to net exposure to an asset while calculating position health and stress tested portfolio value, expressed as a negative percentage for accounts net long an asset, or a positive percentage for accounts net short an asset. Spark and Arkis have discretion to implement more conservative collateral haircuts than those listed in the artifact on a case by case basis.
